introduction.aboutContent_dataScience: I am a software developer with a recent focus on Data Science. I have worked with .NET, SQL Server and automations, but in 2025 I started a formal transition toward data analysis and modeling. I have explored real challenges such as the WiDS 2022 datathon (breast cancer detection) and WiDS 2025 (ADHD detection in women). I am currently training in various data science tools with the goal of building complete end-to-end projects by early 2026. My solid engineering background allows me to approach data science from a practical, structured and product-oriented perspective.
introduction.aboutContent_webDev: Web developer with a background in Information Technology Engineering and experience in developing and maintaining internal web applications. I have worked with C#, .NET, and SQL Server building systems with roles, dashboards, and reports oriented to enterprise environments. Focused on developing functional, structured web solutions aligned with the organization's operational needs.
introduction.aboutContent_dataAnalyst: Data Analyst with a background in Information Technology Engineering and practical experience in data analysis within industrial environments. Experience analyzing production, warehouse, and supply chain data to identify recurring errors, reworks, and data quality issues. Ability to build dashboards and reports that allow detecting patterns, root causes, and improvement opportunities. Analytical and structured profile, focused on data-driven decision making.
introduction.aboutContent_DataAnalysis: Data Analyst with a background in Information Technology Engineering and practical experience in data analysis within industrial environments. Experience analyzing production, warehouse, and supply chain data to identify recurring errors, reworks, and data quality issues. Ability to build dashboards and reports that allow detecting patterns, root causes, and improvement opportunities. Analytical and structured profile, focused on data-driven decision making.
introduction.aboutContent_dataEngineer: IT Professional with experience in operational data analysis and the development of solutions for managing and processing enterprise information. I have worked with databases, process automation, and data analysis for production, warehouse, and supply chain departments. My focus is on building data pipelines, data cleansing and transformation, and generating reliable datasets for analysis and decision-making. Experienced in SQL, Python, and analytical tools to structure data from ERP systems and operational processes.
introduction.aboutContent_pyDev: Software Developer with a background in Information Technology and experience in process automation, data analysis, and internal tool development. I have leveraged Python for data manipulation, database integration, and creating scripts aimed at optimizing operational workflows. Experienced in SQL, APIs, and data processing to build solutions that automate repetitive tasks and improve information availability for business units.
introduction.aboutContent_javaDev: IT Engineer with experience in enterprise application development and the maintenance of web systems used in industrial environments. I have contributed to the development and support of internal applications for operational management, including the implementation of role-based access control, dashboards, and reporting for administrative and production areas. Experienced in backend architecture, database integration, and developing solutions focused on improving internal processes.
introduction.aboutContent_cDev: Information Technology Engineer with a solid foundation in low-level programming using C and C++. Experienced in developing programs focused on efficiency, memory management, and problem-solving through data structures and algorithms.
introduction.goalContent: Evolve toward Data Science roles while continuing to grow as a Full Stack Developer.
introduction.journeyContent: My journey through technology led me to study Information Technology Engineering at UTAN campus industrias in 2022. What I love about development is the creative process of building customized solutions for each project. My experience developing desktop applications strengthened my interest in creating solutions that directly impact the user experience. This path has led me to become interested in data science, where I see the potential to combine development with data analysis to create more complete solutions.
introduction.locationSubtitle: Base of operations and geographic availability

daikin.name: Daikin Manufacturing México
daikin.description: Internship period subcontracted by Probecarios to collaborate in the IT department of Daikin Manufacturing México, participating in internal application development, Oracle ERP support, and operational data analysis.

resp.development: Development and maintenance of internal web and desktop applications
resp.oracle: Oracle ERP user support: account management, responsibility assignments, and correction of supplier and site data
resp.sql: SQL query optimization and stored procedure development in SQL Server and Oracle SQL
resp.analysis: Operational data analysis and Excel dashboard generation for root cause identification
resp.agile: Collaborative work with agile methodologies, Jira, and ServiceNow

projects.budget: Budget Control — Web application for monitoring variances between actual and budgeted expenses, integrating AP and GL from Oracle
projects.etiquetas: Labels — Desktop application for label generation and printing in Warehouse, reducing process time by over 50%
projects.masterLabel: Master Label — Web system for reprint analysis that reduced errors from ~8,000 to ~100 per month
projects.overtime: Overtime Request — Maintenance of the overtime cost calculation system with corporate SSO

img2.title: Overtime Request
img2.desc: Maintenance of the system used by finance to calculate snack and transportation costs for production staff during overtime. Integrates SSO with corporate accounts, plant supervisor records, and transport routes with stops.

img3.title: Labels
img3.desc: Desktop application for Warehouse that queries supplier information from Oracle via API, generates barcode labels using iText, and manages printing. Configurable via JSON to adjust label size without developer intervention. Reduced process time by over 50%.

img4.title: Master Label
img4.desc: Web system developed to investigate massive Master Label reprints (8,000 in December 2024). The analysis identified the issue in two specific production lines; the implemented solution reduced reprints from ~8,000 to ~100 per month.

img5.title: Budget Control
img5.desc: Finance tool that automates the processing of accounts payable (AP) and general ledger journals (GL) from Oracle, generating consolidated Excel files for cash flow analysis and budget variance monitoring.

devportfolio.name: DevPortfolio
devportfolio.description: Professional web portfolio with dark mode design, animated particles, typewriter effect, interactive carousel with touch support, vocational charts with Chart.js, and dynamic ES/EN multilanguage support.
devportfolio.h1: Dark mode design with animated particles
devportfolio.h2: Multilanguage ES/EN support with dynamic JSON

img1.title: Introduction Section
img1.desc: Main view with typewriter effect, animated particles and navigation sidebar.

wids2025.name: WiDS Datathon 2025
wids2025.description: Predictive model focused on early detection of ADHD/ADD in adolescent women, addressing the historical diagnostic bias against women. A classification model was designed and implemented using XGBoost, with a thorough data cleaning and preparation process prior to training.
wids2025.h4: Complete data cleaning and preprocessing pipeline

img1.title: XGBoost Model
img1.desc: Model results and feature importance visualization for ADHD/ADD detection in adolescent women.

wids2022.name: WiDS Datathon 2022
wids2022.description: Analysis of medical datasets to improve breast cancer detection accuracy. The project identified whether a patient would receive a definitive diagnosis within 90 days, using Machine Learning techniques on real sociodemographic and clinical data.
wids2022.h1: Exploratory analysis of clinical and sociodemographic data
wids2022.h2: Data normalization and missing value handling

img1.title: Exploratory Analysis
img1.desc: Visualization of distributions and correlations in the clinical dataset to identify whether a patient would receive a definitive diagnosis within 90 days.

prosalud.name: ProSalud
prosalud.description: Medical management system for clinics that automates administrative and clinical processes such as appointments, records and billing, with treatment tracking and staff management.

img1.title: Main Dashboard
img1.desc: System overview with quick access to patients, appointments and billing.

bookshelf.name: BookShelf
bookshelf.description: Personal library management system for cataloging books, authors and literary genres, with asynchronous AJAX loading, dynamic forms and advanced search.
bookshelf.h1: Full CRUD with AJAX updates without reload
bookshelf.h2: Data access with Dapper on SQL Server
bookshelf.h3: Filtering and search by category and author

img1.title: Book Catalog
img1.desc: Main catalog view with filtering and real-time search options.

cluster.program: Technological trends in the automotive sector
